headline: Veteran Loan Fund launches Accelerator to boost Veteran and Military Spouse businesses
summary: The Veteran Loan Fund (VLF), a national effort of Community Development Financial Institutions (CDFIs) advancing economic opportunity for military-connected entrepreneurs, today announced the launch of the Veteran & Military Spouse Business Accelerator, created to expand access to capital, training, and business support for Veteran and Military Spouse entrepreneurs across the country. headline: Insulet (PODD) Appoints Mike Panos as Chief Commercial Officer
summary: Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ:PODD) is one of the 8 Most Oversold Strong Buy-Rated Stocks to Invest In. On March 30, 2026, Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ:PODD) announced the appointment of Mike Panos as Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer, effective immediately. headline: How The DaVita (DVA) Investment Narrative Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Valuation Assumptions
summary: DaVita is back in the spotlight as analysts recalibrate their price targets, with some boosting estimates by as much as $30 while the core Fair Value sits at $151.71. These shifts are being driven less by a new story about the business and more by how different research firms are weighing risk, required returns, and the balance between bullish and cautious views on the stock. Read on to see what is really changing in the DaVita narrative and how to track those shifts as new updates come...

headline: US Bank inks NFL sponsorship in latest step of brand’s cultural evolution
summary: CMO Michael Lacorazza details a deal that enlists likely top draft pick Fernando Mendoza as the bank’s Chief Financial Playmaker.

headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Find Risky
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.

raw.headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Find Risky

headline: How The Heritage Insurance (HRTG) Story Is Shifting With New EPS Targets And Buybacks
summary: A higher price target of $39 for Heritage Insurance Holdings has brought fresh attention to how closely valuation now tracks updated earnings expectations. Bullish analysts link this figure to a $5.00 EPS estimate and improved assumptions around day to day attritional losses, while more cautious voices focus on the increased execution risk if those assumptions do not hold up across different claim cycles. Below is a look at how to interpret these shifting narratives and what to watch as the...

headline: How The Inventiva (ENXTPA:IVA) Story Is Shifting With Lanifibranor And Analyst Revisions
summary: Inventiva’s updated analyst narrative now reflects a Fair Value move from €8.98 to about €10.00, a shift that aligns with the refreshed price target range highlighted in recent research. This reset sits against a backdrop of contrasting views on how effectively lanifibranor can progress through later stages and what that could mean for the company’s overall appeal within small to mid cap biotech coverage. Read on to see how to track these changing views and what to watch as the story...
